name: Overnight Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar with melted butter.
2. Sift flour and baking powder together.
3. Add eggs alternately with the sifted flour mixture to the creamed butter and sugar.
4. Stir in vanilla if desired.
5. Divide the dough into four portions.
6. To each portion, add one of the following:
- 1/2 cup coconut
- 1/4 cup peanut butter or nuts
- 1/2 cup dates
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon and nutmeg
7. Roll each portion separately in wax paper or place in molds.
8. Chill in the refrigerator.
9. Slice and bake at 400 degrees for 7-10 minutes.
